title: Eurya ochnacea
taxonomy: Eurya ochnacea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphylacaceae. This family is a part of the larger order Ericales, which includes various other flowering plant species. Eurya ochnacea is native to China and is often found in mountainous regions. The exact classification of Eurya ochnacea is as follows: Kingdom - Plantae, Clade - Angiosperms, Clade - Eudicots, Clade - Asterids, Order - Ericales, Family - Pentaphylacaceae, Genus - Eurya, Species - E. ochnacea. Further classification may be more specific depending on the source used.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various diseases such as fever, cough, and skin infections.
